prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约22385→17482→14943→12926→27426，2024年达到近年最高点12926后，2025年大幅后移至27426，主要受荣昌校区专业组 拆分及招生结构调整影响，近两年波动剧烈；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划2021年55人、2022年56人、2023年61人、2024年58人、2025年54人，2026年计 划大幅增至83人，较2025年扩招约54%，显著增加招生名额，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年升至第61位， 近年排名稳步上升（2021年第68→2026年第61），学校综合实力持续增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议（25条事件中23条中性、2条负面 ），整体影响有限；抖音热度为较热（总排名第38位），近年热度有所下降但仍有较高关注度；2021-2025年无投档断档记录；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义 理论A-，3个A-及以上学科，在师范类院校中学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏 高，与该校物理类招生专业（电子信息类、机械类、人工智能等）高度契合；甘肃省2026年高考总人数218700人，按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算约147600人，较2025年物理类121 443人增长约21.5%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；西南大学位于重庆（西南地区），与甘肃地理距离适中，在甘肃招生占比约1%-2%，属中等偏下水平；2025年 该校在甘肃招生总人数约61人（物理类54+历史类7），占比不高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后移（27426）有回归压力、2026年大幅扩招54%使位次继续后移、以及甘 肃省考生总数增长21.5%部分抵消扩招效应，预计2026年物理类最低位次约35962名，区间35462–36462名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 22385 → 17482 → 14943 → 12926 → 27426. After reaching a recent high of 12926 in 2024, it significantly dropped to 27426 in 2025, mainly due to the split of Rongchang Campus major groups and adjustments in enrollment structure, causing severe fluctuations in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu was 55 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 54 in 2025. In 2026, the plan sharply increases to 83, an expansion of about 54% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings rose to 61st in 2026, steadily improving in recent years (from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026), indicating continuously enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management (23 neutral and 2 negative out of 25 incidents), with overall limited impact. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 38th overall), with declining but still considerable attention in recent years. No admission gaps from 2021 to 2025. It has 3 A- or above disciplines: Psychology A, Education A, and Marxist Theory A-, showing outstanding disciplinary strength among normal universities, attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, closely matching the university's Physics Category admission majors (Electronic Information, Mechanical, Artificial Intelligence, etc.). In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Gansu is 218,700, with an estimated 147,600 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 67.5%, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (Southwest region), with moderate geographical distance from Gansu. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1%-2%, at a medium-low level. In 2025, the total enrollment in Gansu was about 61 (54 in Physics Category + 7 in History Category), a relatively low proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal ranking drop in 2025 (27426) with pressure to recover, the significant 54% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing further ranking decline, and the 21.5% increase in Gansu examinees partially offsetting the expansion effect, the estimated minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 35962, with a range of 35462–36462.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 35462–36462, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 35000), you can prioritize popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Electronic Information and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 36000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 majors at Rongchang Campus to ensure admission.
